graphChecks.notes: This task is primarily a shared-structure and validation compatibility sync.

runtimeLogs: GitHub Actions smoke sanity log showed backend startup succeeded, then browser smoke failed because auth helpers treated cookie-backed login as an invalid response.
Local frontend lint also surfaced repository-local .tmp generator artifacts, so lint now ignores temporary test output directories to match the intended frontend source boundary.
runtimeGap: Full end-to-end smoke still depends on CI services and Playwright browser/runtime setup; local evidence here focuses on the smoke helper regression path and validation commands required for merge readiness.
knownGaps: The full browser smoke suite is only partially covered locally in this turn because the local environment lacks the same hosted service setup as GitHub Actions.
This task intentionally does not expand smoke coverage beyond the compatibility fix needed for the current base sync.
